blockThreshold.description: Risk score at which navigation is blocked. Default: 65. Lower = more aggressive blocking.

reportOnly.description: When true, high-risk navigations are logged but not blocked. Useful for monitoring before enforcing.

disableBypass.description: When true, removes the 'Proceed anyway' button from the warning page. Users cannot bypass blocks.

customAllowlist.description: Registrable domains (e.g. 'internal-tool.company.com') that are never flagged regardless of risk score.

customBlocklist.description: Registrable domains that are always blocked regardless of risk score, with no bypass option.

reportingEndpoint.description: URL to POST audit events to (blocked/bypassed/warned). Leave empty to disable reporting.
